title: Technical and clerical personnel; legislative auditor
doc_html:
§558.  Technical and clerical personnel; legislative auditor

To the extent possible, the legislative auditor shall furnish to the council such technical and clerical personnel as may be necessary to enable it to accomplish the purposes of this Chapter.  

Acts 1978, No. 357, §2.
